action.reasoning: Observation: Per-task PPO baseline with 20k steps/task gave success_rate=0.0 everywhere (mean rewards far below bars, e.g. walk=6.8 vs 700, package~-6173 vs 1500). Pipeline works (predict.py correct, no API/Monitor bugs, all 10 tasks covered). Training_curves empty due to dummy metrics. Analysis: Insufficient steps for complex humanoid tasks; CPU+small n_envs=4 too slow, no obs norm, tiny default MLP (64x2), no eval logging. Decision: Scale to 200k steps/task, n_envs=8+SubprocVecEnv+spawn, device=auto (GPU), larger net [256,256], add post-train eval (5 eps) for real mean_reward in metrics.jsonl, keep per-task models to avoid obs_dim issues. Expect some positive movement in rewards; submit_eval to measure progress and iteration time (~20-30min).
